# Gym

> White-label gym management SaaS for Brazilian academies. Multi-tenant
> platform with student management, recurring billing (PIX, boleto, credit
> card), class scheduling, and a fully white-labeled student app.

Gym is a Brazilian B2B SaaS that helps gym owners ("academias") manage
their entire operation from a single panel — students, payments,
schedules, workout plans, body assessments — while their members get a
mobile app branded with the academy's logo, colors, and subdomain. The
platform integrates natively with Asaas (the Brazilian payment gateway)
for PIX, boleto, and credit-card recurring billing.

Founded 2025. Six people in São Paulo. No outside investment.
Pricing starts at R$ 99/month. 14-day free trial, no credit card.

## Key pages

- [Landing](https://gym.app/): Product overview, hero, features, pricing
  summary, FAQ, social proof
- [Recursos / Features](https://gym.app/features): Deep-dive into the 5
  product surfaces — financial automation, schedule + bookings,
  workout plans, white-label app, reporting
- [Preços / Pricing](https://gym.app/pricing): Three plans
  (Starter R$ 99, Business R$ 199, Pro R$ 399 per month) with full
  comparison table and FAQ
- [A plataforma / About](https://gym.app/about): Company story, team,
  values, public stats (240+ academies, 38k students, R$ 4.8M/month
  in processed billing)
- [Contato / Contact](https://gym.app/contact): Sales WhatsApp, support
  e-mail, demo booking

## Product surfaces

- **Cobrança recorrente** — Native Asaas integration: PIX (zero effective
  fee), boleto, credit card. Automatic dunning, conciliation, receipts.
- **Agenda + reservas** — Weekly schedule per instructor and room.
  Students book from the app, automatic waitlists, push reminders.
- **Fichas de treino** — In-app workout plans with exercises, sets, reps,
  load history. No PDFs, no WhatsApp.
- **App white-label** — Student app branded with the academy's logo,
  colors, subdomain. Custom domain on Business and Pro.
- **Relatórios** — MRR, churn, retention, frequency, overdue rates.
  Export CSV.

## Differentiators

- **No fee on transactions.** We charge the SaaS subscription only —
  zero markup on Asaas's transaction fees.
- **No fidelity, no lock-in.** Cancel any time, export your data.
- **The student app is the academy's app.** White-label is the product,
  not a feature.
- **Roadmap is public** — discussed in a WhatsApp group with customer
  academies. The next three features always come from there.

## Stack

- Backend: Strapi v5 + PostgreSQL + GraphQL
- Website: Next.js 14 + Apollo Client 4 + Tailwind
- Student app: Expo (React Native) + Apollo Client 4

Self-hosted in São Paulo, Brazil. LGPD-compliant by design.
